title: Submarine Delivery Agency (SDA): Corporate plan financial years 2024 to 2027
body: "The Submarine Delivery Agency (SDA) is an Executive Agency of the Ministry of Defence. The vision and primary purpose of the SDA is to lead a high-performing, industrial enterprise to deliver the United Kingdom’s submarine capability safely and securely, and more effectively and cost-efficiently every year. These corporate plans set out the organisation’s vision, purpose and strategic objectives.  "
